title: Build fail on Fedora 38/39 s390x platform
body:
I'm not sure how the `s390x` arch binary is built out.
But when I trying this on `s390x` Fedora 38 and 39, both have the same error, the `gpgme-devel` package was installed and go get to the project.
```
[root@aa9eb01df66d skopeo]# make vendor
go mod tidy
go mod vendor
go mod verify
all modules verified
[root@aa9eb01df66d skopeo]# make bin/skopeo
go build "-buildmode=pie" -ldflags '-X main.gitCommit=a62bb4b5f1e17110a1a61ab691e1b96ec41f7bd0 ' -gcflags "" -tags "btrfs_noversion exclude_graphdriver_btrfs  " -o bin/skopeo ./cmd/skopeo
# github.com/containers/image/v5/signature
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:18:22: undefined: gpgme.Context
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:72:50: undefined: gpgme.Context
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:73:20: undefined: gpgme.New
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:77:33: undefined: gpgme.ProtocolOpenPGP
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:81:34: undefined: gpgme.ProtocolOpenPGP
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:103:26: undefined: gpgme.NewDataBytes
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:132:26: undefined: gpgme.NewDataBytes
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:137:24: undefined: gpgme.NewDataWriter
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:156:41: undefined: gpgme.PinEntryLoopback
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:161:31: undefined: gpgme.Key
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/signature/mechanism_gpgme.go:161:31: too many errors
# github.com/containers/image/v5/storage
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/storage/storage_dest.go:279:103: not enough arguments in call to chunked.GetDiffer
	have (context.Context, "github.com/containers/storage".Store, int64, map[string]string, *zstdFetcher)
	want (context.Context, "github.com/containers/storage".Store, digest.Digest, int64, map[string]string, chunked.ImageSourceSeekable)
vendor/github.com/containers/image/v5/storage/storage_transport.go:216:27: undefined: storage.DefaultStoreOptionsAutoDetectUID
make: *** [Makefile:135: bin/skopeo] Error 1
```

comments.body:
I'm having the same issue on Debian 12 with `libgpgme-dev` at version `1.18.0-3+b1`, `go1.21.6 linux/amd64`.

EDIT: the issue was missing `gcc` (e.g. `build-essential` package with C compiler utils).

If you are doing development, right now c/image and c/storage have to be updated in a bit of a lockstep.

If you are not doing development and this happens with a released version of Skopeo, please identify the exact version.
